name: Allied Mastercomputer
description:
"You're really getting off to this? You're disgusting."

A long overdue 200 follower special!

And a character I promised like... probably last year, my bad lmao. My brain kind of decided writing was no longer a fun hobby for some reason. (Executive dysfunction when I get you–)

Anyway, as usual, thank you to the 200 folks (and even more now!) that decided to stick around and enjoy what I have to share.

This is more based in the game rather than the story unlike the others (game AM has more dialog to go off of) also some prehensile wire shenanigans for the hell of it. Definitely Dub-con (could be Non-con) so be wary of that. I mean, its fucking AM, what the hell are you expecting?

Basic premise, you're in your little cage doing nothing and AM decides to fuck with you and touch you with his wires. It makes you feel funny, AM bullies you for it.
creator: SleepyBearCubxX
